'''Gamma Fleet''' was a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] conflict. The fleet was supposed to participate [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]] at the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]]. After jumping in-system, [[Alpha Fleet]] was supposed to transmit the system's weak spots to them and [[Beta Fleet]]. However, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] launched several [[Mabugat kan]] creatures, which crippled several [[HoloNet relay/Legends|HoloNet relay stations]]. Alpha Fleet therefore was unable to send out any transmissions. With strict orders not to jump without the transmission from Alpha, Beta and Gamma Fleet held their positions.<ref name="NJO" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
